title: Oil edges lower as market watches Trump-Xi meeting
section_path: Oil edges lower as market watches Trump-Xi meeting
section_path_text: Oil edges lower as market watches Trump-Xi meeting
summary:
Main
Energy fell as the market awaits the Trump-Xi meeting. Industrial metals extended gains on supply losses. Precious metals fell on higher US inflation.

children.title: Main
children.summary: Energy fell as the market awaits the Trump-Xi meeting. Industrial metals extended gains on supply losses.

children.title: Market Commentary
children.summary: Crude oil prices dipped, as the market awaits a pivotal meeting between Trump and Xi. That is despite Trump downplaying the amount of attention the Middle East conflict would get during the summit.

children.title: Chart of the Day
children.summary: India's gold imports are likely to take a hit following the more than doubling of import tariffs. Although gold import volumes fell to 640t in 2025, higher gold prices meant that their total value still rose significantly.
